# BEYONDVYU — Turn happy customers into authentic Google reviews
https://beyondvyu.com

## About
BEYONDVYU helps local businesses collect more authentic Google reviews with QR codes and an AI assistant that jogs your customers' memory — fully compliant with Google and FTC policy.

## Key features
- QR code-based review collection
- AI-powered sentiment analysis and talking points
- WhatsApp and email review request templates
- Weekly automated insights delivery
- Multi-location support
- No review gating — all customers see same Google review link
- FTC and Google policy compliant
